title: iva asperifolia var. angustifolia
intro: Iva asperifolia var. angustifolia, also known as the coastal groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections. The health benefits of Iva asperifolia var. angustifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
